senses.definition: milk or foods that are made from milk, such as butter and cheese

examples.x: Yogurt is a healthy dairy product that can be enjoyed with fruits or cereals.
Some people are lactose intolerant and cannot digest certain dairy products.
Butter is another popular dairy product used in cooking and baking.
Many dairy products are rich in calcium, which is important for bone health.
Milk and cheese are both common dairy products consumed daily in many households.

senses.definition: a type of seasoning or sauce that is used to add flavor to food

examples.x: A squeeze of lemon juice can act as a refreshing condiment to brighten up seafood dishes.
Condiment is an essential part of a well-seasoned meal.
Olive oil and balsamic vinegar are classic condiments for dressing a fresh salad.
The restaurant offers a variety of condiments for burgers.
Vinegar is a common condiment used in salads.

senses.definition: a plant with seeds, leaves, or flowers used for cooking or medicine, such as mint and parsley

examples.x: I love the aroma of fresh herbs in my kitchen.
Mint is a refreshing herb that pairs well with fruits, salads, and beverages.
Rosemary is a versatile herb that adds wonderful flavor to roasted meats.
The garden is filled with an assortment of herbs like parsley, sage, and cilantro.
The recipe requires a mix of fresh herbs for a more vibrant taste.

senses.definition: a type of dried plant with a pleasant smell used to add taste or color to the food

examples.x: Cinnamon is a versatile spice that can be used in both sweet and savory dishes.
The aromatic spice fills the kitchen with a delightful scent.
The dish lacked spice, so I added some turmeric and curry.
The recipe calls for a pinch of spice for added flavor.
Spices like turmeric and cumin are common in Indian cuisine.

senses.definition: a substance used to add sweetness to food or beverages

examples.x: I prefer using honey as a natural sweetener in my morning oatmeal.

senses.definition: a liquid fat derived from plants or animals used for cooking purposes

examples.x: Extra virgin olive oil is a popular cooking oil known for its rich flavor and health benefits.
For a healthier option, you can use cooking oil instead of butter in your baking recipes.
I drizzled cooking oil over the vegetables before roasting them in the oven.
Some common types of cooking oils include canola oil, vegetable oil, and sunflower oil.

senses.definition: a substance taken from animals or plants and then processed so that it can be used in cooking

examples.x: The chef added a small amount of fat to the pan for cooking.
Vegetable fat is often used in baking as a butter substitute.
He prefers to cook with plant-based fats like coconut oil.
The fat was melted before being added to the stew.

senses.definition: plants without true roots, leaves, or stems, which grow in or near a body of water, such as seaweeds

examples.x: Sushi rolls are often wrapped in sheets of edible algae, known as nori.
Algae play a crucial role in marine ecosystems, providing food and oxygen for many aquatic organisms.
The scientists studied various types of algae to understand their potential for biofuel production.

senses.definition: something we can eat that grows on trees, plants, or bushes

examples.x: For a refreshing summer treat, try blending frozen fruit, like bananas and berries, into a creamy smoothie.
He made a smoothie with a blend of frozen fruits.
I bought a variety of fresh fruits from the grocery store.
Sliced watermelon is a juicy and hydrating fruit to enjoy on a hot summer day.

senses.definition: a diverse group of organisms that include mushrooms, yeasts, and molds, characterized by their ability to decompose organic matter

examples.x: The presence of certain fungi, like Penicillium, is essential in the production of some types of cheese.

senses.definition: a plant or a part of it that we can eat either raw or cooked

examples.x: Fresh vegetables like tomatoes, cucumbers, and lettuce make a delicious salad.
Grilled vegetable skewers are a crowd-pleasing appetizer at summer cookouts.
I always start my day with a nutritious vegetable omelette packed with spinach, tomatoes, and mushrooms.
I tossed the roasted vegetables with olive oil and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
The restaurant offered a vegetarian dish with a mix of seasonal vegetables.

senses.definition: a fine powder made by crushing wheat or other grains, used for making bread, cakes, pasta, etc.

examples.x: For a gluten-free option, substitute regular flour with almond flour in the cake recipe.
The baker dusted the work surface with flour to prevent the dough from sticking.
The homemade pasta dough is made with a simple mixture of flour, eggs, and a pinch of salt.
The flour mixture was mixed with water to form the batter.

senses.definition: small, hard seeds that are harvested from cereal plants and used as a food source

examples.x: Brown rice is a delicious and healthy grain that pairs well with various dishes.
Popcorn is a popular snack made from whole grain kernels that are heated until they burst.
Quinoa is a versatile grain that can be used in salads or as a side dish.

senses.definition: the flesh of animals and birds that we can eat as food

examples.x: Grilled chicken breast is a lean and flavorful meat option for a healthy dinner.
I bought a pound of fresh meat from the butcher.
She cooked the meat on low heat to ensure it was tender and moist.
She seasoned the meat with herbs and spices before cooking.
Slow-cooked pulled pork, served with barbecue sauce, is a popular meat dish.

senses.definition: a sweet white or brown substance that is obtained from plants and used to make food and drinks sweet

examples.x: A teaspoon of sugar can sweeten your morning coffee or tea.
Freshly baked chocolate chip cookies are even more delicious with a touch of sugar.
I'm trying to cut down on sugar in my diet, but it's so hard.
The children enjoyed colorful cotton candy at the fair, made from sugar.

senses.definition: an oval or round thing that is produced by a chicken and can be used for food

examples.x: I love having a sunny-side-up egg on my avocado toast.

senses.definition: a white carbohydrate food substance that exists in flour, potatoes, rice, etc.

examples.x: Rice is a good source of starch and pairs well with stir-fried vegetables.
You can use tapioca starch as a gluten-free alternative in baking recipes.

senses.definition: a type of fungus capable of converting sugar into alcohol and carbon dioxide, used in making alcoholic drinks and bread swell

examples.x: Adding a teaspoon of yeast to the pizza dough will help it rise and become fluffy.
I need to activate the yeast by dissolving it in warm water before adding it to the bread dough.

senses.definition: a mixture of different ingredients cut up and used to stuff meat or vegetables

examples.x: Grandma's secret stuffing recipe includes a combination of diced onions, celery, and fragrant herbs.
The stuffing adds a delightful texture and taste to the stuffed mushrooms, making them a crowd favorite.

senses.definition: meat of chickens, turkeys, and ducks

examples.x: I bought a whole chicken from the grocery store to make a delicious poultry dish for dinner.
Poultry is a lean source of protein and a healthier alternative to red meat.
She prepared a mouthwatering chicken curry using a blend of spices and tender pieces of poultry.

senses.definition: a mixture consisting of flour, milk, and eggs, used for making pancakes, or for covering food before frying

examples.x: I dipped the fish fillets in a light and crispy batter before frying them.
The fluffy pancakes were made from a simple batter of flour, eggs, milk, and a pinch of salt.
What's the key to a perfect tempura batter?

senses.definition: a thick mixture of flour, liquid and sometimes yeast that is baked into bread or pastry

examples.x: Pizza dough needs to be stretched and shaped before adding the toppings.
The cookie dough is ready to be rolled into small balls and baked.
The doughnut dough is rising before it gets fried.

senses.definition: a concentrated substance derived from a natural source, often used to add flavor or fragrance to food, beverages, or other products

examples.x: A touch of maple extract in the pancake batter gives them a delightful maple syrup taste.

senses.definition: a small cube made from dried vegetable or meat juices, used to flavor soups, etc.

examples.x: I added a stock cube to the simmering pot of chicken soup for extra flavor.

senses.definition: very small pieces of bread, used in cooking especially for coating items of food before frying

examples.x: Coat fish fillets with breadcrumbs and pan-fry them until they are golden and crispy.
Sprinkle breadcrumbs over creamy soups or chowders to add a delightful crunch.
She coated the chicken breasts with breadcrumbs before frying them to achieve a crispy, golden crust.
For the casserole, he sprinkled a mixture of breadcrumbs and cheese on top to create a crunchy, savory topping.
The recipe called for fresh breadcrumbs, so she processed a few slices of bread in the food processor.

senses.definition: a type of sweet spread made by cooking fruits with sugar

examples.x: I spread a spoonful of strawberry confiture on my toast for a sweet and tangy breakfast.
She gifted me a jar of homemade confiture made from mixed berries.

senses.definition: a thick creamy sauce made with milk, eggs, sugar, flour or corn flour that is served hot on top of puddings, fruits, etc.

examples.x: Vanilla custard is a popular choice for filling pastries and cream puffs.

senses.definition: a glossy and transparent coating applied to food for added flavor, shine, or decorative purposes

examples.x: The chef brushed a sweet glaze made of honey and soy sauce onto the grilled salmon.
The donut shop offers a variety of glazes, including classic vanilla, chocolate, and colorful options like strawberry

senses.definition: a combination of ingredients used as a filling for pastries, sandwiches, and other food items

examples.x: The filling in the pastry was sweet and creamy.
They chose a vegetable filling for the wraps.
The filling was too spicy for my taste.
You can use a variety of fillings, such as cheese or ham, for these rolls.

senses.definition: a substance or mixture added to food to enhance its flavor, typically consisting of herbs, spices and salt

examples.x: I sprinkled some seasoning on my grilled chicken for added flavor.
The chef used a secret blend of herbs and spices as the seasoning for the famous fried chicken.

senses.definition: a substance extracted from plants that is typically sticky and viscous in nature

examples.x: Some candies have a glossy coating made with edible gum.

senses.definition: a mixture of chopped fruits, spices, and sometimes meat, traditionally used as a filling in pies and desserts

examples.x: I love baking mincemeat pies during the holidays.
Mix mincemeat with cream cheese to create a delicious and tangy fruit dip.

senses.definition: a concentrated liquid or paste made from boiling or simmering meat to extract its flavor and nutrients

examples.x: I'm thinking of adding some meat extract to the marinade for the grilled chicken.
Our chef uses a combination of herbs, spices, and a hint of meat extract to give it that exceptional flavor.

senses.definition: a soft or hard food made from milk that is usually yellow or white in color

examples.x: Sprinkling Parmesan cheese over pasta dishes adds a savory touch.
They enjoyed a slice of mozzarella cheese with their fresh tomato and basil salad.

senses.definition: a clarified and concentrated soup made from rich stock or broth

examples.x: The consomme was served in a small cup as an appetizer before the main course.
The restaurant's signature dish is a consomme made from slow-cooked beef bones.

senses.definition: a decorative or flavorful element added to a dish to enhance its visual appeal or taste.

examples.x: The dessert was beautifully presented with a garnish of chocolate shavings on top.
The plate of pasta was finished with a garnish of grated Parmesan cheese.
The soup was topped with a swirl of cream and a sprinkle of chopped chives as a garnish.

senses.definition: a liquid that is made by cooking meat, bones, vegetables, or fish in water, used for making gravy or soup

examples.x: I strained the vegetable stock after simmering carrots and onions to achieve a clear liquid.
The recipe called for beef stock, so I used store-bought stock as a convenient shortcut.

senses.definition: a plant-based protein made from defatted soy flour used as a meat substitute in vegetarian and vegan dishes

examples.x: In my plant-based lasagna, I replaced the meat with textured vegetable protein.
These vegetarian meatballs are made with a mixture of mushrooms and textured vegetable protein.

senses.definition: a mixture of eggs, cream, or other ingredients used to thicken sauces or soups, often providing a smooth and rich texture

examples.x: The chef prepared a creamy mushroom soup by adding a liaison of egg yolks and heavy cream.
The liaison of tomato paste and broth added depth and richness to the hearty stew.

senses.definition: a diced vegetable mixture used in cooking for flavoring sauces, soups, and stews

examples.x: I added a mirepoix of onions, carrots, and celery to my simmering soup for a flavorful base.
The chef instructed us to finely chop the mirepoix vegetables before adding them to the sauce.

senses.definition: a dish made from bread/breadcrumbs and liquid, used in stuffing, dumplings, and as a thickener for soups and sauces

examples.x: The creamy panada added a velvety texture to the chicken croquettes.
The pastry was filled with a delicious panada of ground beef and onions.

senses.definition: a mixture of food ingredients, typically cooked, that have been crushed or beaten together until they form a smooth texture

examples.x: The chef's special included a tender beef fillet served on a bed of creamy garlic mash.

senses.definition: a type of broth made from boiling meat, vegetables, and herbs in water

examples.x: A spoonful of bouillon adds a burst of flavor to the steamed vegetables.

senses.definition: a mixture created by blending fat and flour together, used to thicken and add flavor to various dishes

examples.x: A well-made roux is the key to achieving a velvety and lump-free white sauce for your pasta dishes.
The roux acted as the base for the creamy cheese sauce in the lasagna, binding all the layers together.

senses.definition: a mixture of diced/shredded ingredients with dressing/sauce, used as a filling or topping for dishes like salads or tacos

examples.x: The bruschetta was served with a tangy tomato and basil salpicon on top.
The salad was elevated with a colorful salpicon of roasted vegetables and feta cheese.

senses.definition: a savory or sweet dish made by baking ingredients in a mold or pastry shell

examples.x: The timbale cooked by my grandmother is filled with layers of seasoned meat, vegetables, and cheese.
The vegetarian timbale had roasted veggies, grains, and melted cheese.

senses.definition: a layer of food that is spread over the top of a dish to make it taste or look better

examples.x: She added cheese as a topping for her pizza.
The ice cream had a chocolate topping.
He sprinkled nuts as a topping on the cake.
The salad had a crispy bacon topping.
Yogurt with fruit topping is a healthy dessert.
